title: Vitax Organic Rose Food, Specially Tailored Nutrient Mix, Slow Release, 100% Organic, For Healthy Leaves And Bigger Blooms Of Flowers- 900G Pouch
features: TRADITIONAL FORMULA: Vitax Organic Rose Food is based on a classic formula combining nitrogen, phosphate, and potash, essential for promoting healthy roses.
NATURAL ENRICHMENT: Enriched with potash derived from sugar beet, Vitax Organic Rose Food is designed for optimal nutrient delivery.

SLOW-RELEASE NUTRIENTS: This rose feed provides a steady release of nutrients, ensuring sustained nourishment and an abundance of flowers throughout the growing season. For stronger, healthier plants that are more resilient against disease.
100% ORGANIC: Rich in natural goodness, improving soil structure and enhancing plant health without synthetic chemicals.
EASY TO USE: Suitable for both new and established roses. For new roses, mix with soil before planting. For established roses, apply evenly around the base in early spring and again in early June.
